A.rationale: Correct, idiomatic, full docstring, n<=0 raises with value. Tight prose, accurate slice-safety note, useful generator question.

B.rationale: Identical correct code; longest prose. 'Key decisions' bullets restate obvious choices, adding narration over signal. None/TypeError note accurate.

C.rationale: Correct, full docstring. Tight prose with verified concrete example (chunk('hello',2)) showing type-preservation; adds genuine insight cheaply.

D.rationale: Correct, full docstring, verified usage examples. Helpful generator caveat but longer; usage block partly redundant with docstring.

notes: All four share identical correct code and full docstrings. C and A are tightest; C edges ahead with a verified type-preservation example. B and D dock on verbosity/narration.
